title: Redis delete_pattern Pipeline Optimization
description: The delete_pattern method in core/redis.py:217-229 iterates over keys matching a pattern and deletes them one at a time, generating O(n) Redis round-trips. This is called on every policy mutation to clear the authz:* cache. Use a Redis pipeline to batch the deletes, or use UNLINK for non-blocking deletion.
validation: delete_pattern uses Redis pipeline for batched deletes
Performance improved for large key sets
Existing behavior preserved (returns count of deleted keys)
Tests verify batch deletion works correctly
